modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about the My Home page on D2L

full_description_text: User is unsure what the My Home page is on D2L. They are looking for clarity on its purpose and functionality. This question was submitted through the self-service form.
